title: Block4Block Datapack
description:
(Required Datapack)

Survival mode with a unique cost to breaking blocks.
body:
![Block4Block logo, a lectern with a book on top, the lectern is also a house with a red mat, steps and a green door.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b6d456b07e49c45829d6afbebd6ff05c2ff978e.png)

Block4Block introduces a unique mechanic where you need a block to break a block, changing how you gather resources and survive.

Here's what sets it apart:

- Unique Resource Gathering: Breaking blocks now costs a block.
- Land Claims: Players use lecterns and books to establish land claims. 
- Claims can trade hands. Protect them.
- Vanilla Integration: It aims to improve the vanilla Minecraft experience subtly, with in-universe implementations rather than relying on commands or menus.
- Technical Farms & Inventions: It enables new and interesting farm designs and inventions.

**Note**: _It requires both a plugin and a datapack to function correctly._

**Open Source** and made to be customizable for hosts to create the experience they want.

Try it on: play.b4block.org

**REQUIRED:**
- [Block4Block Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/block4block) (SERVER-SIDE)
- [Block4Block Plugin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/block4block-plugin) (SERVER-SIDE)

**SOFT-DEPENDENCIES:** 
- [ProtocolLib](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/) (SERVER-SIDE)
- [Ultimate Advancement API](https://modrinth.com/plugin/ultimateadvancementapi) (SERVER-SIDE)

**RECOMMENDED**:
- [Block4Block Advancements](https://modrinth.com/plugin/block4block-plugin-advancements) (SERVER-SIDE)
- [Block4Block Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/block4block-mod) (CLIENT-SIDE)
